metadata.title: Endless Group - Curated Luxury Experiences
metadata.description: Discover curated destinations and private luxury experiences with Endless Group. Travel, Lifestyle, Business, and Capital in one place.

items.title: Travels
items.subtitle: Journeys crafted with precision
items.description: Bespoke itineraries and privileged access. We shape every journey into something truly extraordinary.

items.title: Lifestyle
items.subtitle: Luxury in everyday life
items.description: Access to wellness, gastronomy, and entertainment, thoughtfully curated down to every detail.

items.title: Business
items.subtitle: Strategy and network
items.description: Strategic support for growth and opportunity. A global network that opens the right doors.

items.title: Capital
items.subtitle: Long-term vision
items.description: Planning and structure designed to move capital with confidence and long-term perspective.

confianza.description: We don't sell packages. We design each experience with you — private access and absolute discretion.

pillars.title: Bespoke
pillars.text: Every detail built around you, never an off-the-shelf package.

pillars.title: Private access
pillars.text: Reservations and places that aren't open to the public.

pillars.title: Discretion
pillars.text: Your privacy is the foundation of everything we do.

pillars.title: 24/7 concierge
pillars.text: A real person, available at any hour.

closingCta.title: Ready for the extraordinary?
closingCta.description: Tell us what you have in mind. A concierge replies on WhatsApp.

footer.description: Redefining luxury through innovation, exclusivity, and deeply personalized service.

mantenimientoPage.title: Under Maintenance
mantenimientoPage.description: This section is not available yet. We are refining details to deliver an impeccable experience.
